fabricated_divergences.quote: The German-language outlet Tagesschau foregrounds the legal-institutional dimension in Hungary (the dropped court case against Mayor Karácsony and the restrictive law still remaining on the books), whereas English- and French-language coverage emphasizes turnout and the ambiguity of PM Magyar's personal stance.
fabricated_divergences.why_unsupported: The corpus contains no French-language coverage. Both France 24 items (articles 2 and 5) are tagged language 'en' in the metadata; there is no 'French-language' group to contrast, so attributing a framing to French-language coverage invents a group not present in the corpus.
